creator: dburr@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Imported with minor stylistic changes, thanks! 
<Hint: You should run 'portlint' (/usr/ports/devel/portlint) on your 
ports before committing them.  This program checks your ports and flags 
a lot of both serious errors and minor cosmetic/syntactical errors. 

Your name has been added to the FreeBSD Handbook's "Additional 
Contributors" section.
